Revenue +19% YoY — premium tenant occupancy and leasing spreads improving
TradingView STRONG BUY (16 buys, 0 sells)
VCP 4 contractions, tightest 4.2% — constructive base
risks: EPS growth +16% — below ideal 20% threshold
E-commerce continues to disrupt traditional retail anchor tenants
Forward P/E 32.1x — elevated for a REIT; interest rate sensitivity
watch: Earnings in ~41 days (Aug 4)
Price 1.1% from 52-week high $219.04 — breakout is imminent
RSI at 69 — watch for any distribution signals above $219

picks.name: SpaceX (via SPCX)
picks.thesis: NEW LISTING — Thesis-driven entry only; quant signals are thin by design (only weeks of trading history). SpaceX has near-monopoly on commercial orbital launch (Falcon 9 >60% global market share), a rapidly growing Starlink satellite internet business, and the world's most ambitious next-generation vehicle in Starship. IPO area was ~$161; current $156 is slightly below. TV has no rating yet — expected for a new listing. For long-term investors this is a conviction hold on the next decade of space infrastructure. Treat as high-risk speculative allocation.
strengths: Commercial launch near-monopoly — Falcon 9 dominates global market share
Starlink: satellite internet with no terrestrial competition in remote markets
Starship: if successful, will reduce launch cost dramatically — paradigm shift
No direct public market competitor with equivalent scope and vertical integration
risks: Brand-new listing — price discovery still ongoing; thin trading history
Valuation premium requires multi-decade execution without single-point failure
Government contracts concentration risk — FCC/launch license regulatory exposure
No technical setup signals available yet — purely a fundamental/thesis play
watch: Wait 2-3 months of trading history before relying on any technical signals
Monitor Starlink subscriber growth as the primary fundamental driver to track
Starship test launches — successful orbital mission is a major catalyst
Price $156 below IPO area $161 — monitor for base-building and stabilization
